title: Translation Initiation
summary: The small ribosomal subunit binds the 5' cap of molecules/mrna and scans until it finds the start codon (AUG). The initiator tRNA carrying molecules/methionine base-pairs (anticodon 3'-UAC-5') with AUG. Then the large ribosomal subunit joins to complete the structures/ribosome with the initiator tRNA in the P site.
